title: Place an order with quantity edits and table/note and see confirmation
description: Verifies a customer can browse categories, add an item, modify quantity, add table/notes, submit the order, and see an order confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /:slug
Click a category to browse its products
Add a product to the cart
Open the cart
Increase the quantity for the cart item
Fill a table number into the table number field
Fill an order note into the order note field
Submit the order
Verify an order confirmation is displayed
Verify the placed order summary is displayed

title: Update an order through the full fulfillment lifecycle
description: Verifies staff can view an active order, move it from pending to preparing to completed, and confirm it appears under the completed filter.

steps.description: Navigate to /{{TENANT_SLUG}}/admin/orders
Wait for the active orders list to load
Select an order with status pending
Change the order status to preparing
Change the order status to completed
Filter orders by status to show completed orders only
Verify the updated order appears in the completed orders list

title: Remove an item from cart, adjust remaining quantities, and submit order
description: Verifies a customer can add multiple products, remove one, adjust quantities for remaining items, submit the order, and see confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /:slug
Add a product to the cart
Add a different product to the cart
Open the cart
Remove one cart item
Increase the quantity for the remaining cart item
Submit the order
Verify an order confirmation is displayed
Verify only one item is included in the order summary

title: Filter to pending orders and fulfill one end-to-end
description: Verifies staff can use the pending filter to find a pending order and successfully complete it through preparing and completed states.

steps.description: Navigate to /{{TENANT_SLUG}}/admin/orders
Wait for the active orders list to load
Filter orders by status to show pending orders only
Select a pending order from the filtered list
Update the order status to preparing
Update the order status to completed
Verify the order is no longer listed under the pending filter

title: Create a new tenant store with email/password and reach access instructions
description: Verifies a merchant can register a new store with a unique slug and sees a success confirmation with access instructions for the new store.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new store name into the store name field
Fill a new unique store slug into the store slug field
Fill a valid email into the admin email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify access instructions for the new store are displayed

title: View active orders list in the orders dashboard
description: Verifies staff can open the orders dashboard and see a list of active orders displayed for operational triage.

steps.description: Navigate to /{{TENANT_SLUG}}/admin/orders
Wait for the active orders list to load
Verify a list of active orders is displayed

title: Sign in as an existing customer and return to the tenant menu
description: Verifies a customer can log in within a store context and is redirected back to the tenant menu after successful sign-in.

steps.description: Navigate to /:slug/auth
Select the login mode
Fill a valid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify a login success confirmation is visible
Verify the user is redirected to the tenant menu

title: Register a new customer account within a tenant and return to the menu
description: Verifies a customer can create a new account in a specific store context and is redirected to the tenant menu after successful registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /:slug/auth
Select the registration mode
Fill a new customer name into the name field
Fill a new valid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an account creation success confirmation is visible
Verify the user is redirected to the tenant menu

title: Switch between status filters without breaking the list
description: Verifies staff can switch status filters (e.g., pending, preparing, completed) and see the orders list update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /{{TENANT_SLUG}}/admin/orders
Wait for the active orders list to load
Filter orders by status to show pending orders only
Filter orders by status to show preparing orders only
Filter orders by status to show completed orders only
Verify the orders list updates when each filter is selected

title: Validate required fields then successfully register tenant
description: Verifies missing required registration fields are validated and, after correction, the store registration completes successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new store name into the store name field
Fill a new unique store slug into the store slug field
Submit the registration form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Fill a valid email into the admin email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Prevent invalid status transitions from the UI
description: Verifies the UI prevents or blocks an invalid order status change that is not allowed from the current state.

steps.description: Navigate to /{{TENANT_SLUG}}/admin/orders
Wait for the active orders list to load
Select an order in a non-pending state
Attempt to change the status to an invalid next state for that order
Verify the status does not change and an inline validation or disabled control prevents the invalid transition

title: Handle empty-state when a status filter has no matching orders
description: Verifies the orders dashboard shows an appropriate empty state when filtering to a status with no matching orders.

steps.description: Navigate to /{{TENANT_SLUG}}/admin/orders
Wait for the active orders list to load
Filter orders by status to show a status that yields no results
Verify an empty state is displayed for the filtered orders list

title: Correct an invalid email during customer registration and complete sign-up
description: Verifies invalid email input is rejected during store-scoped registration and the customer can correct it and successfully register.

steps.description: Navigate to /:slug/auth
Select the registration mode
Fill a customer name into the name field
Fill an invalid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible
Fill a valid email into the email field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is redirected to the tenant menu

title: Prevent submitting an empty cart then allow ordering after adding an item
description: Verifies submitting an empty cart is blocked with a validation message and, after adding a product, the order can be submitted successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /:slug
Open the cart
Submit the order
Verify an empty-cart validation message is visible
Close the cart
Add a product to the cart
Open the cart
Submit the order
Verify an order confirmation is displayed
